display_text: Does the product containing your AI system require a third-party conformity assessment under the applicable Annex I Section A regulation?
hint_text: Article 6(1) makes an AI system high-risk only when two conditions are met: (1) it is a safety component of an Annex I product, AND (2) that product requires a third-party conformity assessment (i.e., an independent notified body must certify it — not a manufacturer's self-declaration). Check the specific regulation that applies to your product. For example, Class IIa or higher medical devices require a notified body assessment; many general machinery products do not.

options.label: Yes — the product requires a third-party conformity assessment by a notified body under the applicable regulation
No — the product only requires a manufacturer's self-declaration of conformity (no notified body involved)
